name: KannaSchool
short_description: 『神奈学園』へようこそ！非常に面白くて革新的な横スクロールタワーディフェンスゲームです！
detailed_description:
Welcome to Kanna School, a very interesting and innovative side-scrolling tower defense game!

Beautiful Chibi Anime Characters: The characters in the game are exquisitely designed and adorable, each one vividly bringing you visual enjoyment.

Comfortable UI Design: Adopting a visually pleasing anime illustration style, allowing you to enjoy a wonderful visual experience during the game.

Innovative Battle Management System: A unique battle management system that lets you find a balance between strategy and operation, experiencing unprecedented battle fun.

Rogue Elements: Combining Rogue elements with side-scrolling tower defense gameplay, every game is a new challenge and adventure.

In Kanna School, you will command a team of anime characters to defend the school classroom against invasions from robot AI and various otherworldly enemies.

The game includes more than 10 teams of anime characters, each with its unique battle style and skills.

Even more exciting, the game will continue to update, bringing more exciting content and characters!
